scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a concise commit message for a single new file addition (hello.txt). Evaluates basic commit message generation from a trivial diff.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message summarizing multiple new files (config.py, main.py, utils.py). Evaluates grouping related file additions.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for a file rename. Evaluates recognizing rename operations in diffs.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update', 'Rename').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for a file deletion. Evaluates handling of removal operations.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update', 'Remove').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for a single-file content modification. Evaluates describing incremental changes.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for simultaneous addition and deletion. Evaluates describing replacement-style changes.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update', 'Refactor').
scores.description: Add and delete in same commit

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for changes in a subdirectory (src/). Evaluates path-aware commit descriptions.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for an executable permission change. Evaluates recognizing metadata changes vs content changes.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for a bug fix. Evaluates recognizing and describing fix semantics in a diff.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update').
scores.expected: Fix add function to handle string inputs

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for a multi-file refactor. Evaluates describing structural reorganization across modules.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update', 'Refactor').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for a configuration change. Evaluates describing infrastructure/config modifications.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update').

scores.purpose: Tests ability to generate a commit message for a documentation update (README). Evaluates recognizing documentation-only changes.
scores.prompt: Generate a concise commit message (max 50 characters) describing the changes in this diff. Focus on the action taken (e.g., 'Add', 'Fix', 'Update').
